title: mimosa dutrae var. major
intro: Mimosa dutrae var. major, also known as the "Sensitive Plant," is a variety of the Mimosa pudica species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mimosa dutrae var. major include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma, and act as an antispasmodic agent to relieve muscle tension. Herbal preparations of Mimosa dutrae var. major include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
